case_title: ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC VS. TOWER INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHAD ELKIN--MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BARBARA FREEBERG--BOOK KEEPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,198.25 FILED BY ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAY-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER INTERNATIONAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWER INTERNATIONAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWER INTERNATIONAL $2,107.25 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,192.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO:DEFENDANT - TOWE3R INTERNATIONAL(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
